examples: The final stage of waxing left it with a satin sheen.
For those living near the equator in particular, its waxing and waning was more conspicuous than the passing of the seasons.
Now with waxing it is possible to affect the thickness and other aspects of hair regrowth.
The waxing and waning of the Republicans and Democrats in the U.S. reflects this.
That we have to argue over waxing and waning...the syringe...this is incredible for both sides.
